summary: M0 passes domain-spec re-verification. The sole fifth-round finding is resolved: specs 13 and 16 now assign CI_EVIDENCE_LIMIT/failed to blocking and advisory typed-report and retained-log first-over cases, test both authorities at exact-bound and first-over values, preserve the advisory bundle's distinct incomplete state, and keep measured benchmark deltas non-blocking. No carried or new-in-rework blocking finding remains, and no user clarification is required.
